entry.title: Release strategy not triggered in SES
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created new release strategy for SES with characteristics CESSR_LWERT and CESSR_WERKS.

Created new class, Release group, Release codes and maintained value in the classification.

Now when i create SES using ML81n, Release strategy is not triggering. Only the green flag (accept) appears also

in Goto->Entry sheet, relese strategy is not active (unable to select).

Please suggest
